steps.title: Identify the subject of the relative clause
steps.content: The subject is collection — a singular noun. The prepositional phrase “of artworks by Indigenous peoples of the Americas and other artists of the American West” modifies the noun but does not change its number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: The rule is subject-verb agreement: a singular subject requires a singular verb. Choice B ranks is the only singular form. Choices A, C, and D all use plural verbs, which violate the agreement rule. That matches choice B — B is correct.
